name: Dakos
intro: chile, oils, lemon juice, sesame seeds, nigella seeds, and ½ teaspoon salt, stir

ingredients.item: large tomatoes, cut into ⅜-inch/1-cm dice (2¾ cups/500 g)
red onion, cut into ¼-inch/5-mm dice (⅓ cup/50 g)
oz/150 g Cretan dakos or other rusks, coarsely broken
cup/40 g black olives, pitted and halved
tbsp/30 g capers, whole or very coarsely chopped
tbsp/5 g chopped flat-leaf parsley, to serve salt and black pepper

method: Place the tomatoes, onion, vinegar, 2 tablespoons of the oil, the allspice, a scant ½ teaspoon salt, and a good grind of black pepper in a large bowl. Stir

Spread out the dakos on a serving platter and spoon the tomato mixture on top. Sprinkle the feta, olives, and capers over the tomato mixture, followed by the parsley and the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil. Leave to sit for 5 minutes before serving.
